name: status-repository-path-validation
title: Fail closed for missing sd-status repository paths
description: A fleet consumer review found that a missing positional sd-status path is treated like a file and silently falls back to the parent repository. Require an existing directory or existing file before Git discovery and preserve existing file-path support.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Released as 0.21.3, retained in 0.21.4, and verified across all seven fleet consumers.
